cases.prompt: 내가 로그인하는 웹사이트에 자동 로그인 후 글 자동 발행되게 해줘. 폼 자동 작성까지.

assertions.text: Creates a reusable per-site form-schema JSON under .web-publisher/ (url, selectors, fields, files, submit, confirm)
Drives the gstack browse headless Chromium with cookies loaded via setup-browser-cookies
Never hardcodes credentials; secrets are injected at run time via keepass-helper/env vars

cases.prompt: automate the upload — fill the form and submit, publish to website

assertions.text: Navigates, fills, uploads, submits, then verifies a success signal (pass/fail)
Stops for user confirm before submit when the publish creates public content or costs money
